notes: Updated based on Surfer SEO 1M-page study 2025, Uprankd plumbing data 2026. Word count has zero correlation with rankings. Keyword density is dead as a metric. Focus: topical completeness, E-E-A-T, local uniqueness, answer capsule.

business_data.service_area: Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Vaughan, Markham, Richmond Hill, Oakville, Burlington, and all GTA

word_count_2026.note: Word count is NOT a ranking factor (Surfer SEO 2025 study). Target topical completeness, not length. Padding hurts conversion.

keyword_density_2026.note: Keyword density is NOT a ranking factor (confirmed by Google/John Mueller). Exact-match density on top-ranking pages: 0.04%-1%. Above 1.5-2% triggers spam filters.
keyword_density_2026.strategy: Use semantic variations instead of repeating exact keyword. For appliance repair: brand names (LG, Samsung), specific parts (drum bearing, door gasket, drain pump), symptoms (not draining, not heating, leaking), service types (same-day, emergency, certified).

answer_capsule.description: Phone + city + service in first paragraph. +40% AI citation rate. Critical for AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity.
answer_capsule.format: Who does [service] in [city]? -> [Business] does, call [phone], available [hours].

local_uniqueness.description: Page must prove real existence in that area. Not find-and-replace. Include local specifics.

topical_completeness.description: Cover the topic fully in fewer words. Specific symptoms, brands, prices, process, warranty.

ai_search_geo_2026.note: GEO = Generative Engine Optimization. AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, AI Overviews) cites pages with direct answers.
ai_search_geo_2026.direct_answer_format: Question -> Answer with specifics (price, time, phone)

removed_from_scoring: Keyword density 2-2.5% (obsolete - now checked as spam risk instead)
